'''Herzob''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. It exported [[Grain/Legends|grains]] to several worlds in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]] and [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The planet was infested with [[jevesect]]s, which tore through the planet-spanning farms.

{{Planet-stub}}
